title: papaver sulphureum
intro: Papaver sulphureum, also known as the yellow poppy or sulphur poppy, is a flowering plant species in the poppy family (Papaveraceae). The plant contains alkaloids with medicinal properties, including morphinan alkaloids, which have been used to treat various health conditions, such as pain and inflammation. The yellow poppy is known for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to reduce stress and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Papaver sulphureum, such as tinctures and infusions, are sometimes used in traditional medicine to address conditions like insomnia, anxiety, and digestive issues.
